zh.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie是James Tweedie的女兒，於大約1528年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾特拉華爾。她於1550年與Robert Scot在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie是James Tweedie的女儿，于大约1528年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾特拉華爾。她于1550年与Robert Scot在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tweedie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (southern): habitational name from Tweedie, a place in the parish of Stonehouse, south of Glasgow, the name of which is of uncertain origin. This name has been established in Ulster since the early 17th century. In England this name may have become confused with   Twiddy  .

variants.name: Twiddy
meanings: apparently a variant of   Twitty  , with intervocalic voicing of [t] to [d].
possibly also a variant of   Tweedie  , with which it may have become confused.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie was born about 1528, in Traquair, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of James Tweedie. She married Robert Scot in 1550, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

de.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie wurde um 1528 in Traquair, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von James Tweedie geboren. Sie hat 1550 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Robert Scot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie è nata il circa 1528 nel Traquair, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di James Tweedie. Lei sposato Robert Scot nel 1550, nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedieは約1528年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアトラクアでJames Tweedieの娘として生まれた。1550年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスでRobert Scotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie(은)는 대략 1528년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 트라퀄어에서 James Tweedie의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 Robert Scot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie nasceu aproximadamente 1528, em Traquair, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de James Tweedie. Ela casou-se com Robert Scot em 1550, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie родилась около 1528 г. в местности тракуеир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали James Tweedie. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Scot в 1550 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Helen Tweedie nació aproximadamente 1528, en Traquair, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de James Tweedie. Se casó con Robert Scot en 1550, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
